ddl:
CREATE TABLE `subscriptionchurn.raw.accounts`
(
  account_id STRING,
  account_name STRING,
  industry STRING,
  country STRING,
  signup_date DATE,
  referral_source STRING,
  plan_tier STRING,
  seats INT64,
  is_trial BOOL,
  churn_flag BOOL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-08-13T11:11:20.435Z"
);

CREATE TABLE `subscriptionchurn.raw.subscriptions`
(
  subscription_id STRING,
  account_id STRING,
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  plan_tier STRING,
  seats INT64,
  mrr_amount INT64,
  arr_amount INT64,
  is_trial BOOL,
  upgrade_flag BOOL,
  downgrade_flag BOOL,
  churn_flag BOOL,
  billing_frequency STRING,
  auto_renew_flag BOOL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-08-13T11:13:10.753Z"
);

CREATE TABLE `subscriptionchurn.raw.churn_events`
(
  churn_event_id STRING,
  account_id STRING,
  churn_date DATE,
  reason_code STRING,
  refund_amount_usd FLOAT64,
  preceding_upgrade_flag BOOL,
  preceding_downgrade_flag BOOL,
  is_reactivation BOOL,
  feedback_text STRING
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-08-13T11:12:05.506Z"
);

CREATE TABLE `subscriptionchurn.raw.support_tickets`
(
  ticket_id STRING,
  account_id STRING,
  submitted_at DATE,
  closed_at TIMESTAMP,
  resolution_time_hours FLOAT64,
  priority STRING,
  first_response_time_minutes INT64,
  satisfaction_score FLOAT64,
  escalation_flag BOOL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-08-13T11:13:40.966Z"
);

CREATE TABLE `subscriptionchurn.raw.feature_usage`
(
  usage_id STRING,
  subscription_id STRING,
  usage_date DATE,
  feature_name STRING,
  usage_count INT64,
  usage_duration_secs INT64,
  error_count INT64,
  is_beta_feature BOOL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-08-13T11:12:33.195Z"
);
